__fixture__.name: conformance_publish_ready
__fixture__.scenario: All conformance checks pass and compatibility carries only informational deprecations, so the report is publish-ready.

checks.title: Manifest identity is complete
checks.message: Package id, publisher id, and version are present and well-formed.

checks.title: All permissions declare a purpose
checks.message: Every declared permission scope carries a user-facing purpose string.

checks.title: Disable and rollback metadata present
checks.message: The manifest declares a disable path and a rollback target.

checks.title: SDK line is on a supported window
checks.message: The declared SDK line resolves to a supported host ABI window.

compatibility.migration_impact_summary: No deprecated APIs or shims required on the current target range.
